data.title: Survey by PasswordManager.com shows 50% of biz leaders fear Gen Z could leak secrets for likes. Some avoid hiring them.
data.description: A recent survey conducted in Mountain View, California, on September 12, 2025, has highlighted significant apprehensions regarding the way Generation Z handles sensitive company information. It has been discovered that a considerable number of leaders are opting to not hire Gen Z employees due to these concerns. PasswordManager.com, renowned for its expertise in password security and internet safety, released this shocking revelation, bringing attention to the pressing issue at hand. The data indicates that there is a widespread worry among businesses about the security of their confidential data when entrusted to Gen Z individuals. This highlights the growing need for specialized training and awareness programs to address these challenges and ensure the protection of sensitive information.

data.title: Voicing AI achieves 97% accuracy in function calling, surpassing industry average of 80-82%. Breakthrough for enterprise AI.
data.description: In Dover, Delaware on September 12, 2025, Voicing AI declared a significant development in enterprise artificial intelligence. They have reached a remarkable 97% accuracy rate in real-world function calling, surpassing the typical industry average range of 80-82%. This milestone is pivotal as it tackles a longstanding issue in enterprises where...

data.title: Investigative reporter Ed Mahon from Spotlight PA wins 2025 Neil and Susan Sheehan Award; focuses on addiction treatment and opioid epidemic.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, journalist Ed Mahon of Spotlight PA is set to be honored with the 2025 Neil and Susan Sheehan Award for Investigative Journalism by the National Press Club Journalism Institute. Mahon's reporting focuses on addiction treatment and the ongoing opioid epidemic. This prestigious award recognizes his dedication and excellence in investigative journalism.

data.title: Stanley 1913 collaborates with Jennie to launch luxury hydration collection on Sept 18, redefining style.
data.description: A new capsule collection is set to be released on September 18th, showcasing fresh designs from the renowned brand. With a focus on merging style and practicality, the collection offers innovative silhouettes influenced by JENNIE's unique perspective. Hailing from Seattle, the launch by Stanley 1913, a well-known lifestyle brand celebrated for its iconic creations, marks a significant moment in the fashion world. Stay tuned as the brand continues to push boundaries and redefine fashion standards worldwide.

data.title: SmallRig introduces Video Cage Kit for iPhone 17 Pro series, enhancing creative options for users.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on September 12, 2025, SmallRig, a prominent creator and producer of groundbreaking photo and video accessories, launched a range of all-encompassing Video Cage Kits designed for the iPhone 17 Pro Series. Timed to coincide with the release of the latest iPhones, this new collection includes a variety of features and elements tailored for enhancing video and photo capabilities on the iPhone 17 Pro devices.

data.title: Brenda Gasperich joins Quiddity Engineering as Senior Project Manager in North Texas to boost H&H service.
data.description: Brenda Gasperich, a Professional Engineer and Certified Floodplain Manager, has recently been appointed as a Senior Project Manager in the North Texas Practice of Quiddity Engineering in Plano. This addition aims to bolster the company's Hydrology & Hydraulics (H&H) service. The company expressed its excitement regarding Gasperich joining the team, emphasizing her role in expanding and enhancing their services.

data.title: National GED Day on September 16, 2025 celebrates GED learners, educators, and graduates nationwide, honoring life-changing achievements.
data.description: Recognizing the dedication of GED learners, teachers, and graduates across the country, GED® Testing Service is excited to commemorate the second National GED Day on September 16, 2025. This day is a tribute to the millions of individuals who have pursued their GED certificate.

data.title: KingSmith marks a decade milestone with "One Endless Journey" campaign, encouraging innovation and fitness worldwide.
data.description: In Dallas on September 12, 2025, KingSmith, a reputable company in compact fitness technology, commemorates its 10th year in the industry with the introduction of "One Endless Journey" campaign. This campaign pays tribute to a decade of groundbreaking advancements while motivating individuals worldwide to embark on their fitness journey. This launch coincides with the celebration of the company's milestone anniversary, showcasing their dedication to innovation and encouraging individuals to kickstart their fitness endeavors.

data.title: Infinix & PUBG MOBILE to kick off PUBG MOBILE Africa Cup Grand Finals in Kenya on Sept 13 with Infinix GT 30 Pro as official device.
data.description: On September 13, the first PUBG MOBILE Africa Cup Grand Finals will commence in Kenya, utilizing the Infinix GT 30 Pro as the designated tournament device. In a collaboration between Infinix and PUBG MOBILE, the 2025 competition is set to unfold. The event is scheduled to take place in Hong Kong, with the announcement made on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Sanofi releases data on total voting rights and shares for August 2025 as per French Commercial Code and stock market regulations.
data.description: Details regarding the overall count of voting rights and shares, as mandated by article L. 233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and article 223-16 of the Regulation of the French stock market authority, have been disclosed.

data.title: Spectrum Analyzer Market expected to reach $2.28 billion by 2033 with CAGR of 5.98% from 2025-2033, as per ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report on the Spectrum Analyzer Market forecasts significant growth and trends from 2025 to 2033. The market size is expected to increase from US$1.35 billion in 2024 to US$2.28 billion by 2033, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.98% during the forecast period. Factors driving this growth include a heightened focus on strengthening the military and defense industries, the expanding telecommunications sector with the rise of 5G connections, and an increasing demand for such technologies.

data.title: Bragg Gaming Group gets $6.0M debt facilities from BMO, provides cyber breach update.
data.description: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG), a prominent global provider of B2B iGaming content and technology, revealed a fresh financing arrangement with the Bank of Montreal (BMO). Under this deal, BMO has granted the Company access to credit facilities totaling up to US$6.0 million. This funding is aimed at bolstering Bragg’s day-to-day operational needs and general corporate purposes.

data.title: David Ellison's significant spending at Paramount is reshaping Hollywood's atmosphere, making a mark with his quick acquisitions.
data.description: David Ellison has quickly made his mark as the owner of Paramount, particularly in the realm of acquisitions.

data.title: Tether launching USAT stablecoin, regulated under GENIUS Act. Bo Hines appointed CEO. USDT has $169B market cap.
data.description: Tether, the leading stablecoin issuer, has introduced a new U.S.-regulated stablecoin called USA₮. This stablecoin is compliant with the GENIUS Act and aims to adhere to U.S. regulations. The announcement was made in a recent press release. Additionally, Tether appointed Bo Hines, the former executive director of the White House Crypto Council, as the CEO of the new U.S. entity. USA₮ will utilize Hadron by Tether technology and will have Anchorage Digital as the issuer compliant with the GENIUS Act, while Cantor Fitzgerald will act as the reserve custodian. Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, highlighted the company's long-standing presence in the stablecoin industry with its flagship USDT token, which currently holds a market capitalization of $169 billion and is utilized by nearly 500 million users worldwide, particularly catering to the underbanked and unbanked populations. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
